name: Be Fly
short_description: Be Fly — a meditative 2D game where you control a plane to help the main character win competitions. Navigate around obstacles, catch tailwinds, and perform aerial tricks to soothing music.
detailed_description:
Be Fly — a meditative 2D game where you control a plane to help the main character win competitions. Navigate around obstacles, catch tailwinds, and perform aerial tricks to soothing music.

You have 3 levels available—upgrade and purchase new planes to complete them.

Story


A boy participates in a homemade airplane competition to win a prize and give it to his grandfather. With each new takeoff and crash, his aircraft-building skills improve, and his desire to bring joy to his loved one gives him new strength and confidence. Join the hero on this journey.
